## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `dart format --set-exit-if-changed .`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] `dart doc --dry-run .`
- [ ] Example updated or not affected

## API impact

- [ ] No public API change
- [ ] Public API change documented in README/docs
- [ ] Breaking change called out in CHANGELOG
